recommendations.title: Son
recommendations.overview: When a young boy contracts a mysterious illness, his mother must decide how far she will go to protect him from terrifying forces in her past.

recommendations.title: The Forsaken
recommendations.overview: A young man is in a race against time as he searches for a cure after becoming infected with a virus that will eventually turn him into a blood-sucking vampire.

recommendations.title: Escape Room
recommendations.overview: Six friends test their intelligence when an escape room they participate in takes a dark and twisted turn.

recommendations.title: Contracted
recommendations.overview: A young woman contracts what she believes to be an STD—but it ends up being a far worse disease.

recommendations.title: The Premature Burial
recommendations.overview: An artist grows distant from his new wife as an irrational fear of premature burial consumes him.

recommendations.title: The Big Sick
recommendations.overview: Pakistan-born comedian Kumail Nanjiani and grad student Emily Gardner fall in love but struggle as their cultures clash. When Emily contracts a mysterious illness, Kumail finds himself forced to face her feisty parents, his family's expectations, and

recommendations.title: Constantine: City of Demons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: A decade after a tragic mistake, family man Chas Chandler and occult detective John Constantine set out to cure his daughter Trish from a mysterious supernatural coma.

recommendations.title: The Greasy Strangler
recommendations.overview: Ronnie runs a Disco walking tour with his son, Brayden. When a sexy woman takes the tour, it begins a competition between father and son for her love. It also signals the arrival of an oily strangler who stalks the streets at night.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: Nala, a thirteen-year-old girl from the city, travels with her family to her grandmother's home in the countryside, to try to find a cure for her little sister's mysterious illness - But she'll soon find her granny is not exactly what she seems...

recommendations.title: Graduation Day
recommendations.overview: After the death of a high school track star during a race, a mysterious killer in a fencing mask begins murdering her friends and teachers.
